html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Elastispacer is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It allows players to upgrade Chest and Scaled Chest to Tall Chest and Tall Scaled Chest, increasing their stack size.

The rare Blueprint for prototyping the Elastispacer may drop from Abandoned Junk or Scrappy Werepig (after enabling Lunar Rift). It is found in the Storage Solutions Filter and requires 4 Scrap, 2 Pure Brilliance and an Enlightened Shard to craft.

After using the Elastispacer on a Chest, any stackable item will have its stack size limit increased to practically infinite (4,294,967,296), but it will only show "999+" when it contains more than 999 items. The appearance of Tall Chest differs from the usual one in its very elongated model, as well as a golden frame in the UI design of the inventory.

Taking items stacked beyond their limit out of the chest will give one regular stack at a time, instead of the entire amount of said items.

Trivia

  • The Elastispacer was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.

Gallery

  • Tall Chest Concept Art from Rhymes with Play.
  • Tall Chest Concept Art from Rhymes with Play.
  • Tall Chest with every skin

“The laws of physics are surprisingly flexible.”
–Wilson
“More space to stash stuff? Sounds good to me!”
–Willow
“Makes trunk bigger? Hmmm, does little machine work on muscles?”
–Wolfgang
“It will make the emptiness in my chest grow even bigger...”
–Wendy
“OH. YOU ARE BEAUTIFUL”
–WX-78
“Increases the capacity of a storage container by a, frankly, absurd degree.”
–Wickerbottom
“Guess this thing will hollow out more space in my storage chest?”
–Woodie
“Hmph. Dress it up with wires and gears, but I know magic when I see it.”
–Maxwell
“Be this science ör witchcraft?”
–Wigfrid
“Will this make our toy chest bigger?”
–Webber
“Ah! Can this give me the storage space I crave?”
–Warly
“Make space streeeetch!”
–Wormwood
“Looks like something the bossman would've come up with.”
–Winona
“Now that's bending the rules a little, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Make boxes bigger? Glurgh. More fun to leave stuff on ground.”
–Wurt
“I can make more room for supplies!”
–Walter
“More space is always welcome, but more time would be preferred.”
–Wanda
The Elastispacer is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It allows players to upgrade Chest and Scaled Chest to Tall Chest and Tall Scaled Chest, increasing their stack size.
The rare Blueprint for prototyping the Elastispacer may drop from Abandoned Junk or Scrappy Werepig (after enabling Lunar Rift). It is found in the Storage Solutions Filter and requires 4 Scrap, 2 Pure Brilliance and an Enlightened Shard to craft.
After using the Elastispacer on a Chest, any stackable item will have its stack size limit increased to practically infinite (4,294,967,296), but it will only show "999+" when it contains more than 999 items. The appearance of Tall Chest differs from the usual one in its very elongated model, as well as a golden frame in the UI design of the inventory.
Taking items stacked beyond their limit out of the chest will give one regular stack at a time, instead of the entire amount of said items.

The Elastispacer was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.

The '''Elastispacer''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It allows players to upgrade {{DSTL|Chest}} and {{DSTL|Scaled Chest}} to [[Tall Chest]] and [[Tall Scaled Chest]], increasing their stack size.

The rare [[Blueprint]] for prototyping the Elastispacer may drop from [[Abandoned Junk]] or [[Scrappy Werepig]] (after enabling [[Lunar Rift]]). It is found in the [[Storage Solutions Filter]] and requires 4 [[Scrap]], 2 [[Pure Brilliance]] and an [[Enlightened Shard]] to craft.

After using the Elastispacer on a Chest, any stackable item will have its stack size limit increased to practically infinite (4,294,967,296), but it will only show "999+" when it contains more than 999 items. The appearance of Tall Chest differs from the usual one in its very elongated model, as well as a golden frame in the UI design of the inventory.

Taking items stacked beyond their limit out of the chest will give one regular stack at a time, instead of the entire amount of said items.

== {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Chest
|tool = Elastispacer
|result = Tall Chest}}
{{Recipe
|item1 =Scaled Chest
|tool = Elastispacer
|result = Tall Scaled Chest}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Elastispacer
|item2 = Scrappy Slingshot Frame
|result = Scrappier Slingshot Frame
|character = Walter
|skill = Advanced Frames
}}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Elastispacer was introduced in the ''[[From Beyond#Scrappy Scavengers|Scrappy Scavengers]]'' update.
